pull_request.title: Java JIT project milestone
pull_request.body:
- Primitive Arrays
- Bit and Nibble support an corresponding arrays
- Fixed size initialised array support
- Range<Int constants
- Routing methods for caps
- Delegation support
- Map constants
- Various fixes

changed_files.patch:

      */
     public IntConstant ensureIntConstant(PackedInteger pint, Format format) {
         switch (format) {
+        case Int8:
         case Int16:
         case Int32:
         case Int64:
         case Int128:
         case IntN:
+        case UInt8:
         case UInt16:
         case UInt32:
         case UInt64:

commit_summaries.message: Add primitive array support to the JIT
Add creating Range<Int> constants support to the JIT
Introduce TypeConstant.isJitInterface() method
Fix a virtual property support (on interfaces)
Make specialized Array implementations augmentable w.r.t. interfaces
Add support for MoveType op; helper methods; simple refactoring
Fix MethodInfo.getJitIdentity() implementation
Move "throw" helper methods to Builder class; fix ensureRegister()
Generate routing methods for caps
Add JIT support for `Bit` and `Nibble` and corresponding Array types
Add Float* classes to the white list
Add support for delegation
Add support for switch statements
Add support for fixed size array construction (partial)
Add support for Array.mutabiity; augment native enums
Add support for Map constants
Add support for "run" arguments
Fix GP_Compl op for Boolean
Add support for fixed size array construction (partial)
Change the white list processing
